info.name: IssueFlow API — Full QA
info.description: End-to-end manual QA collection for IssueFlow backend. Import IssueFlow.postman_environment.json first. Run folder "00 Setup & Auth" before other modules. Uses seeded admin (admin/admin123). See MANUAL_TEST_PLAN.md for test case IDs and execution order.

item.name: AUTH-001 Login as admin (success)

request.description: TC-AUTH-001: Valid login returns JWT per README.

item.description: TC-AUTH-001: Valid login returns JWT per README.

item.name: AUTH-007 Logout and save revoked token
AUTH-008 Re-login admin for subsequent tests
USER-002 POST /users create DEVELOPER

request.description: TC-USER-002: Create user with README fields.

item.description: TC-USER-002: Create user with README fields.

item.name: USER-003 Login as new DEVELOPER

request.description: TC-USER-003: PD-09 login by username existence.

item.description: TC-USER-003: PD-09 login by username existence.

item.name: USER-007 POST /users/update empty body → 400

request.description: TC-USER-007: At least one field required on update.

item.description: TC-USER-007: At least one field required on update.

item.name: USER-008 POST /users whitespace username → 400

request.description: TC-USER-008: Username must not contain whitespace.

item.description: TC-USER-008: Username must not contain whitespace.

item.name: USER-013 Create second DEVELOPER for mentions
USER-014 Create DEVELOPER project owner (for BR-14)
PROJ-001 POST /projects (ADMIN owner)

request.description: TC-PROJ-001: Create project with valid ownerId.

item.description: TC-PROJ-001: Create project with valid ownerId.

item.name: PROJ-002 POST /projects (DEVELOPER owner)

request.description: TC-PROJ-002: DEVELOPER owner linked as ProjectMember (IC-11).

item.description: TC-PROJ-002: DEVELOPER owner linked as ProjectMember (IC-11).

item.name: PROJ-007 POST /projects invalid owner → 400

request.description: TC-PROJ-007: ownerId must reference existing user.

item.description: TC-PROJ-007: ownerId must reference existing user.

item.name: PROJ-008 GET /projects/:projectId/workload (ADMIN owner → empty)

request.description: TC-PROJ-008 / BR-08: ADMIN excluded from workload pool.

item.description: TC-PROJ-008 / BR-08: ADMIN excluded from workload pool.

item.name: TKT-001 POST /tickets with explicit assignee

request.description: TC-TKT-001: Create ticket with all README fields.

item.description: TC-TKT-001: Create ticket with all README fields.

item.name: TKT-002 POST /tickets auto-assign (no assigneeId)

body.raw:
{
  "title": "QA Ticket Auto Assign",
  "description": "Should auto-assign to dev project owner",
  "status": "TODO",
  "priority": "MEDIUM",
  "type": "FEATURE",
  "projectId": "{{projectId2}}"
}

request.description: TC-TKT-002 / BR-07: Auto-assign on create when assigneeId omitted.

item.description: TC-TKT-002 / BR-07: Auto-assign on create when assigneeId omitted.

item.name: TKT-007 PATCH type field → 400

request.description: TC-TKT-007: type is immutable on PATCH.

item.description: TC-TKT-007: type is immutable on PATCH.

item.name: TKT-008 PATCH priority clears isOverdue flag

request.description: TC-TKT-008 / BR-05: Manual priority change clears isOverdue.

item.description: TC-TKT-008 / BR-05: Manual priority change clears isOverdue.

item.name: TKT-009 Create blocker and blocked tickets
TKT-011 POST add blocker dependency

request.description: Setup for TKT-012: link blocker before DONE transition test.

item.description: Setup for TKT-012: link blocker before DONE transition test.

request.description: TC-TKT-011 / BR-12: DONE blocked by unresolved direct blocker.

item.name: 06 Attachments
item.description: File attachments. ATT-001 requires manual file selection.

item.name: ATT-001 POST upload PNG attachment

formdata.description: Select a valid PNG/JPEG/PDF/TXT file ≤10MB (use test/fixtures or any small image).

request.description: TC-ATT-001: Valid file upload. Manually attach file in Postman.

item.description: TC-ATT-001: Valid file upload. Manually attach file in Postman.

item.name: 07 Import & Export
item.description: CSV export/import. Several requests need manual CSV file attachment.

item.name: 11 User Delete & BR-14/BR-18

item.name: 13 Concurrency (Manual Runner)
item.description: Concurrency tests require Postman Collection Runner with 2 parallel iterations or two clients.

item.name: CONC-000 Create comment for concurrency test
CONC-001 PATCH ticket (run twice in parallel)

request.description: TC-CONC-001 / IC-10: Run this request twice simultaneously via Collection Runner (2 iterations, delay 0). Expect one 200 and one 409.

item.description: TC-CONC-001 / IC-10: Run this request twice simultaneously via Collection Runner (2 iterations, delay 0). Expect one 200 and one 409.

item.name: CONC-002 PATCH comment (run twice in parallel)

request.description: TC-CONC-002: Create a comment first, set commentId, run twice in parallel. Expect one 409.

item.description: TC-CONC-002: Create a comment first, set commentId, run twice in parallel. Expect one 409.
